title: Cough red-flag screening documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed cough warning prompts for cough red-flag screening; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-led emergency, family-medicine, and pulmonary referral according to the documented cough context.
assessment.rationale: Supports qualified referral context for cough red-flag screening; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-led emergency, family-medicine, and pulmonary referral according to the documented cough context.

assessment.text: Supports chest radiography, spirometry with reversibility, sputum testing where infection is suspected, selected inflammatory markers, specialist referral for persistent or unclear cough, and upper-airway specialist assessment when indicated.
assessment.rationale: Supports adult chronic-cough investigation and referral context for cough red-flag screening; no decision is generated.

source.title: British Thoracic Society Clinical Statement on chronic cough in adults
source.population: Adults with chronic cough lasting more than 8 weeks.
source.setting: Primary and specialist assessment of chronic cough.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult chronic cough assessment and referral; not applicable to children and not directly validated for UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports chest radiography, spirometry with reversibility, sputum testing where infection is suspected, selected inflammatory markers, specialist referral for persistent or unclear cough, and upper-airway specialist assessment when indicated.
